title: lithocarpus bonnetii var. tienyenensis
intro: Lithocarpus bonnetii var. tienyenensis, also known as a plant species, is a type of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus bonnetii var. tienyenensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support liver health, making it a valuable resource for traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grinding the leaves or roots into a powder, which can be used in teas, capsules, or infusions.
